subject: english
title: Tiếng Anh NTT 2018-2019 (đề chính thức)
intro: Đề thi khảo sát chất lượng môn Tiếng Anh — Trường THCS & THPT Nguyễn Tất Thành, năm học 2018-2019. Thời gian làm bài 60 phút.
source: Trích đề NTT 2018-2019 (bản có đáp án, đáp án tô sáng trong PDF)

passages.title: Tom's birthday
passages.body:
My name's Tom and yesterday it was my birthday. I was nine and I got a lot of presents. Mum took pictures when I opened my presents. I got a red football and a blue sweater, my favorite colour! But my favorite present was a new bike. It's great. My old bike was small so I didn't like it.
After school I went to the swimming pool with three friends. When we were there, we didn't want to swim at first because the water was very cold, but when we did we had great fun. Then Mum shouted "Time to go home!" so we had a shower and got dressed quickly.

questions.stem: .......... is good for your body and can keep you healthy.
.......... can be used to heat food very quickly by using waves of energy.
These types of food made from milk are .......... .
Which of the following energy sources is unclean and limited?
The sister of your father or mother or the wife of your uncle is called .......... in English.
Nguyen Tat Thanh School was founded .......... July 4th 1998.
Many foreign tourists say that Ho Chi Minh city is .......... than Hanoi.
Hanoi is the .......... of the Vietnam.
In her dream she .......... over the sea and waved to the people on boats below.
Our grandparents live in .......... in the countryside.
Whales are .......... . They are warm-blooded and breathe air through a pair of lungs.
Which of the following activities can help save electricity at home?

options.text: Turn off the lights and the fans when you don't need them.
Plug electric appliances like fridges, lights when they are not in use.
Only do laundry or dishes when you have a full load.

questions.stem: .......... is the flesh of a cow or bull used as food and has a source of high quality protein and nutrients.

Debbie: "Would you like to go to the cinema tonight?"
Becky: ".........."

Daisy: "What do you do for a living?"
Tom: ".........."

Student A: "May I borrow your pen?"
Student B: ".........."
What was Tom's favorite present?
Which of the following words has the same meaning as "presents" in the passage?
What is NOT TRUE, according to the passage?

options.text: Tom's old bike was not large so he disliked it.
Tom and his friends swam and they had a good time.
Mum took pictures when Tom opened his presents.
One of Tom's presents was a red sweater.

questions.stem: How old was Tom?
